raw.subject: ARK Angels, in Dayton; Something I noticed about ARK Angels
raw.body:
Hi,

Your Dayton page caught my eye - I saw how you're showcasing the furry friends in your care, and it's wonderful to see the love and dedication you bring to pet sitting and home care.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and I wonder if it might be leaving some potential bookings or calls on the table, especially since you're serving such a specific area.

I took a closer look at your Facebook posts and photos, and I sketched out a rough page idea that highlights some of the services you offer and the beautiful work you do. I'd love for you to take a look at the mockup:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/ark-angels-llc-dayton

It includes a services overview, a photo gallery, a contact section, and even a map to make it easy for customers to find you.

If you're interested in learning more about how a website could help your business, I'd be happy to discuss it with you and answer any questions you may have. There's a simple flat fee for local businesses, and I'd be happy to provide more details over a quick call or reply to this email with some more information.
